name: slack
description: Slack integration — read, search, and post messages across your workspace via the official Slack MCP.

interface.shortDescription: Read, search & post Slack messages, with official skills
interface.longDescription: Connect the official Slack MCP to read, search, and post messages across your workspace from UniAI — find a conversation, summarize a channel, or send an update. Bundled with Slack's official skills for channel summaries, daily digests, notification triage, and message drafting.
